assertions.title: All services composable into a single Layer

steps.expected: AiToolkitLive exports a merged layer of all 6 services
steps.observed: AiToolkitLive uses Layer.mergeAll to compose FirecrawlLive, MistralOcrLive, GeminiPdfLive, and GoogleServicesLive (which merges GoogleSheetsLive, GoogleCalendarLive, GmailLive with GoogleAuthLive)
AiToolkitLive exported from toolkit.js in barrel file

steps.expected: Test creates merged layer from all 6 services and TypeScript compiles
steps.observed: Test 'provides all 6 services when all config is present' yields all 6 services from AiToolkitLive and verifies each has its expected methods. Test compiles and passes.
toolkit.test.ts: 4 tests passed (composition + 3 ConfigError missing key tests)

files: packages/ai/src/toolkit.ts — AiToolkitLive = Layer.mergeAll(FirecrawlLive, MistralOcrLive, GeminiPdfLive, GoogleServicesLive)
evidence.turboOutput: turbo test: @nivalis/ai:test 8 files, 73 tests passed including toolkit.test.ts (4 tests)

assertions.title: Each AI service has at least one unit test

steps.observed: Found 8 test files: firecrawl.test.ts (9 tests), mistral-ocr.test.ts (8 tests), gemini-pdf.test.ts (8 tests), google-sheets.test.ts (11 tests), google-calendar.test.ts (13 tests), gmail.test.ts (12 tests), google-auth.test.ts (8 tests), toolkit.test.ts (4 tests)

steps.action: Read each test file to verify mocked API responses
steps.expected: Each test uses mock layers or vi.mock to avoid real API calls
steps.observed: firecrawl.test.ts: uses Layer.succeed mock + live config test; mistral-ocr.test.ts: uses Layer.succeed mock + live config test; gemini-pdf.test.ts: uses Layer.succeed mock + live config test; google-sheets.test.ts: uses vi.mock('googleapis') with mock functions; google-calendar.test.ts: uses vi.mock('googleapis') with mock functions; gmail.test.ts: uses vi.mock('googleapis') with mock functions
All 8 test files passed: 73 total tests, 0 failures. Services covered: Firecrawl (9), MistralOcr (8), GeminiPdf (8), GoogleSheets (11), GoogleCalendar (13), Gmail (12), GoogleAuth (8), Toolkit (4)

evidence.testOutput: turbo test exit code 0. @nivalis/ai:test: Test Files 8 passed (8), Tests 73 passed (73). Duration 978ms.

steps.expected: Package builds (@nivalis/ai, @nivalis/utils) complete before apps/web build
steps.observed: turbo build completed: @nivalis/ai:build and @nivalis/utils:build completed first (cache hit), then @nivalis/web:build ran successfully. All 3 tasks successful, exit code 0.

steps.action: Verify build ordering from turbo output
steps.observed: @nivalis/ai:build (cache hit) and @nivalis/utils:build (cache hit) listed before @nivalis/web:build. Web build produced Next.js 16.1.6 production build with routes: /, /_not-found, /api/auth/[...all], /icon/[__metadata_id__], /robots.txt, /sitemap.xml

evidence.buildOutput: turbo build: Tasks 3 successful, 3 total. @nivalis/utils:build -> @nivalis/ai:build -> @nivalis/web:build (correct ordering). FULL TURBO. Exit code 0.
buildWarnings: Better Auth: Base URL could not be determined (expected with placeholder env)
Better Auth: BETTER_AUTH_SECRET should be at least 32 characters (expected with dev-secret)

summary: Tested 3 assertions: 3 passed, 0 failed. VAL-AITK-012: AiToolkitLive in toolkit.ts correctly merges all 6 AI service layers using Layer.mergeAll; composition test in toolkit.test.ts confirms all 6 services are accessible. VAL-AITK-013: All 6 AI services have dedicated test files with mocked API responses; 73 tests across 8 files all pass. VAL-CROSS-006: turbo build resolves dependencies correctly — packages build before apps/web; full build succeeds with exit code 0.
